name: Fastenal
analysis: FAST has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Trade setup: entry $45.5855, stop $42.7977, target $46.5519. Risk/reward is 0.35:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
